title: Add/update sim tests for hop sequence using ccp16-hop.json with independent oracle, tag codereview
description: Extend test_vectors.py or test_multinode.py / test_protocol.py to validate synchronized_hop_channel and rendezvous against ccp16-hop.json, ccp16.json, ccp9*.json using hash_32 oracle from generate.py (never derive from impl). Run pytest python/tests/sim/ after. Tag all with codereview. Fix any test integrity violations per AGENTS.md. No hardcoded mocks.
